title: UPSC Combined Medical Services CMS Online Form 2026
post_name: UPSC Combined Medical Services CMS Examination 2026 Apply Online Form
organization_full_name: General Duty Medical Officer GDMO in Various Delhi Municipal Council
fee_payment_method: Pay the Examination Fee Through Debit / Credit Card or Net Banking or Pay the Examination Fee Through E Challan
age_relaxation_notes: Age Relaxation Extra as per UPSC CMS 2026 Recruitment Rules
how_to_apply: Live Photo Required : Candidate Live Photo Required.
To apply for Combined Medical Services Examination CMS 2026 in Union Public Service Commission (UPSC), it will be necessary to do One Time Registration. Applications will not be accepted without OTR.
The application window of UPSC Combined Medical Services Examination CMS 2026 can be applied online from 11 March 2026 to 31 March 2026.

The number of examination centers / cities remains limited in UPSC Combined Medical Services Examination CMS 2026 recruitment, so if the candidate wants the examination city of his choice, then applies as soon as possible. After applying, the exam city which will be seen in red color means that that city is now full.
After completing the application in UPSC Combined Medical Services Examination CMS 2026 Recruitment, take the final print out.
for More Details Must Read the Notification.
